quotes.quote: The drug candidates are ranked by an LLM-judged tournament according to the strength of the scientific rationale, pharmacological profile, and methodology of the supporting literature.
quotes.rationale: Identifies an LLM evaluator whose output is a ranking over candidates against stated criteria.

quotes.quote: When comparing the LLM judge’s preferences with experts’, the LLM judge demonstrated high concordance with expert preferences, with an average of 7.25 of its top 10 hypotheses matching those in the experts’ top 10 (Supplementary Figure S11A).
quotes.rationale: Agreement study reported for this exact channel and target property.

quotes.quote: When presented with identical pairwise comparisons, the LLM judge selected the same hypothesis in 88% of comparisons, as compared with human experts who selected the same hypothesis 61% of the time.
quotes.rationale: Human experts act as a separate assessing evaluator of the judge; the comparison is reported, not routed into search.

quotes.quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis. Robin then interprets the results of this analysis to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates.
quotes.rationale: Human-executed physical experiments yield measurements routed back into a new candidate round.

quotes.quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis.
quotes.rationale: Confirms humans, not the system, execute the assays.

quotes.quote: Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human and subsequent differential gene expression analysis was performed by Finch.
quotes.rationale: The automated component performs only part of the pipeline; upstream steps are human-performed.

quotes.quote: Robin then interprets the results of this analysis to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates.
quotes.rationale: Analysis output feeds candidate revision rather than terminal reporting only.

quotes.quote: Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.
quotes.rationale: A distinct human-substrate analysis channel whose downstream routing the packet does not state.

quotes.quote: For example, while Robin generates experimental outlines, it does not yet produce precise, executable protocols—future iterations aim to provide detailed methodologies that require minimal human translation for laboratory execution.
quotes.rationale: Executability of generated protocols is stated as unachieved and only aspirational, so no exercised validation exists.

diagnostics.statement: The system does not produce precise, executable laboratory protocols; it produces only experimental outlines requiring human translation.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: while Robin generates experimental outlines, it does not yet produce precise, executable protocols

diagnostics.consequence: No executability validation of generated designs is possible, and the physical-assay channel depends on unrecorded human reinterpretation of each design.

diagnostics.statement: Reliability evidence for the ranking channel is limited to expert-preference concordance and intra-rater consistency; no probabilistic calibration or systematic bias test is reported.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: the LLM judge demonstrated high concordance with expert preferences, with an average of 7.25 of its top 10 hypotheses matching those in the experts’ top 10
The drug candidates are ranked by an LLM-judged tournament

diagnostics.consequence: Agreement and repeat-consistency cannot support claims about the judge's error structure or confidence calibration; biases shared with experts stay invisible.

diagnostics.statement: No prior-art or novelty check is reported; the stated ranking criteria concern rationale, pharmacological profile, and literature methodology only.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: according to the strength of the scientific rationale, pharmacological profile, and methodology of the supporting literature

diagnostics.consequence: Top-ranked candidates could duplicate known prior work with no channel able to detect it.

diagnostics.statement: Routing of the human flow-cytometry analysis is not stated; the packet reports that the analysis happened but not whether its output re-enters candidate generation.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.

diagnostics.consequence: Closure for that evidence stream cannot be derived; it may be terminal reporting rather than feedback.

diagnostics.statement: No independent replication of the experimental findings by a separate laboratory is reported in this packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis.

diagnostics.consequence: Empirical adequacy rests on a single non-independent experimental pipeline, leaving reproducibility unestablished.

diagnostics.statement: The division of labour between automated and human analysis is partial and unevenly documented across assays.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human and subsequent differential gene expression analysis was performed by Finch.
Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.

diagnostics.consequence: Autonomy attributions for the analysis stage are overstated unless the system boundary is specified per assay.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: the LLM judge exhibited higher intra-rater consistency than human experts

success_check.observable: Rank-order shift of the tournament under non-substantive perturbations (candidate order, source labels, prompt paraphrase).
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: No systematic preference shift beyond the reported 88% repeat-selection rate attributable to perturbation.
success_check.evidence_needed: A reported bias/perturbation study on the same tournament channel and criteria.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The drug candidates are ranked by an LLM-judged tournament according to the strength of the scientific rationale, pharmacological profile, and methodology of the supporting literature.

success_check.observable: Fraction of top-ranked candidates flagged as previously reported against a literature/patent corpus.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every candidate advancing to wet-lab evaluation carries an explicit prior-art determination.
success_check.evidence_needed: Documented corpus search results linked to each ranked candidate.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis.

success_check.observable: Effect direction and magnitude for the reported assays repeated in a separate laboratory.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Replicated effects consistent in direction with the original at a prespecified significance level.
success_check.evidence_needed: A reported independent replication with its own physical measurements.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human
Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.

success_check.observable: Per-assay statement of which pipeline steps are automated and where each analysis output is routed.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: No analysis step left with unstated actor or unstated downstream consumer.
success_check.evidence_needed: A stage-by-stage responsibility and routing description in the source.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: it does not yet produce precise, executable protocols—future iterations aim to provide detailed methodologies that require minimal human translation for laboratory execution

success_check.observable: Presence of a recorded human approval step translating generated outlines into executed protocols.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Every executed experiment traces to a human-approved protocol version.
success_check.evidence_needed: Protocol provenance records tying executed runs to approved translations.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: This concordance is more than double that expected from random selection.

success_check.observable: Downstream assay outcome rate of top-ranked versus low-ranked candidates.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Ranking predicts physical assay outcomes better than chance on a held-out candidate set.
success_check.evidence_needed: Outcome-linked validation using measurements not available to the judge at ranking time.
